tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device_tool
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables-save > /root/iptables.before_icmp && iptables -N ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT 2>/dev/null || true && iptables -F ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT && iptables -A ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -m recent --update --seconds 10 --hitcount 20 --name ICMPLIST --rsource -j DROP && iptables -A ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -m recent --set --name ICMPLIST --rsource -j ACCEPT && iptables -A ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -j DROP && iptables -C INPUT -p icmp -j ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I INPUT -p icmp -j ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT && iptables -L ICMP_FLOOD_PROTECT -n -v --line-numbers && iptables -L INPUT -n -v --line-numbers"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device_tool
